business.name: Atico Furniture
business.tagline: If you can imagine it, we can build it. Just for you.
business.address: 3505 Garden Brook Dr, Farmers Branch, TX

payments.notes: Lead-gen site (custom/bespoke — no e-commerce). Single committed CTA is 'Request a Consultation', posting via FormSubmit to info@aticofurniture.com. No Stripe payments on this site.

meta.concept: The Commission — Atelier of Steel & Timber (warm paper + dark forge bands)
meta.notes: All branding (colors, fonts) lives in assets/css/custom.css as CSS custom properties. Imagery is CSS/SVG placeholders the client swaps 1:1 with real photos at launch.
